items.title: 'Politicisation by Pakistan': Lalit Modi blames PCB for influence of India-Pak cricket freeze
items.summary: Former IPL chairman Lalit Modi expressed pessimism about India and Pakistan resuming bilateral cricket soon, citing significant political interference within the Pakistan Cricke...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'Joke': Madrid fume at costly red card in UCL exit
items.summary: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said it was "obvious" that Eduardo Camavinga's red card was crucial in Real Madrid's Champions League quarterfinal elimination by Bayern Munich on Wednesday...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jackson loses WA contract after being leading one-day bowler
items.summary: Teague Wyllie also loses his deal while pace bowler Kieran Elliott has moved west from Tasmania
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
